Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
All laboratory values are within normal limits except for a mildly elevated chloride and slightly decreased total CO₂, which may suggest a mild non-anion gap metabolic acidosis but could also be due to pre-analytical factors. Renal function, glucose control, and lipid profile are unremarkable. No immediate laboratory concerns; clinical correlation is advised.
